title: Hyllyard Hotel
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hyllyard Hotel''' was a [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] in [[Hyllyard City]] on [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]].

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], the hotel served as the headquarters for an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] unit stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
